Engagement rate is the opposite of bounce rate.
So if someone sticks around on your website for longer than 10 seconds or scrolls on a page or clicks on a URL on that page, that counts as engagement.
And if they don't do that, if they just leave the website right away, that doesn't count as an engaged session.
So that's a really important metric for us to monitor because it impacts SEO visibility.
